mapper.sql: id, family_id, user_id, role, join_status, join_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mf_family_member ( family_id, user_id, role, join_status, join_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{joinStatus}, #{joinTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mf_family_member WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.family_id, a.user_id, a.role, a.join_status, b.nickname, a.join_time, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM mf_family_member a left join mf_user b ON a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.family_id = #{familyId} AND a.join_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY a.create_time ASC

SELECT fm.family_id AS family_id, f.family_name AS family_name, f.family_code AS family_code, f.member_count AS member_count, f.meet_date AS meet_date, fm.role AS role FROM mf_family_member fm JOIN mf_family f ON fm.family_id = f.id WHERE fm.user_id = #{userId} AND fm.join_status = 'APPROVED' AND f.status = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time ASC

SELECT fm.user_id AS user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS nickname, fm.role AS role FROM mf_family_member fm LEFT JOIN mf_user u ON fm.user_id = u.id WHERE fm.family_id = #{familyId} AND fm.join_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN fm.role = 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, fm.join_time ASC, fm.id ASC
